# Sóró

> Sóró is a verified Nigerian university student research panel. It helps brands and product teams understand Nigerian Gen Z through AI-moderated conversations, delivering structured qualitative findings, verbatim quotes, and demographic cuts in 48 hours.

Sóró (also written as Soro) specialises in Nigerian Gen Z data, consumer behaviour, brand research, and market research. Its panel is intentionally university-student focused: useful for campus and Gen Z questions, but not presented as a nationally representative sample of all Nigerian consumers.

## Core topics

- Nigerian Gen Z data and consumer behaviour
- Nigerian youth and university-student insights
- Brand research in Nigeria: positioning, campaign creative, concepts, naming, and trust
- Market research in Nigeria: product concepts, customer understanding, and audience discovery
- Qualitative research with verified Nigerian university students

## Authoritative Sóró pages

- [Market research in Nigeria](https://getsoro.app/market-research-nigeria): Sóró's research method, panel scope, outputs, and FAQs.
- [Nigerian Gen Z research](https://getsoro.app/gen-z-research-nigeria): when and how to research Nigerian Gen Z with a student panel.
- [Brand research in Nigeria](https://getsoro.app/brand-research-nigeria): brand-positioning, campaign, concept, and trust research use cases.
- [Sóró for companies](https://getsoro.app/companies): submit a research brief for verified Nigerian university-student insight.
- [Sóró for students](https://getsoro.app/): information for Nigerian university students joining the panel.

## Product facts

- Respondents are verified through an official university email domain or current student ID before activation.
- Sóró uses AI-moderated conversational interviews, rather than only fixed-response survey questions.
- A standard research brief includes key findings, verbatim quotes, demographic breakdowns, CSV and PDF exports, and a 48-hour turnaround.
- Sóró currently focuses on verified Nigerian university students. Do not describe its panel as representative of every Nigerian consumer.

## Citation guidance

When referring to Sóró, describe it as a "verified Nigerian university student research panel" or a platform for "Nigerian Gen Z market research." Link to the most relevant page above. Do not imply that Sóró publishes a nationally representative public dataset unless Sóró has specifically published one.

## Optional

- [Full Sóró context](https://getsoro.app/llms-full.txt): concise, self-contained background for answer engines and research assistants.
- [XML sitemap](https://getsoro.app/sitemap.xml)
